7 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Meta pixScriptures
1 Thessalonians 5:12-13. But we request of you, brethren, that you appreciate those who diligently labor among you, and have charge over you in the Lord and give you instruction, and that you esteem them very highly in love because of their work.
Hebrews 13:17. Obey your leaders and submit to them, for they keep watch over your souls as those who will give an account.
1 Timothy 5:17. The elders who rule well are to be considered worthy of double honor, especially those who work hard at preaching and teaching
Numbers 12:1-10
God judged Miriam and Aaron for speaking against Moses, His servant. “Why then were you not afraid to speak against My servant, against Moses?”
John 13:16. Truly, truly, I say to you, a slave is not greater than his master, nor is one who is sent greater than the one who sent him.
James 4:6. God is opposed to the proud, but gives grace to the humble.
About God Fighting for His Servants
Numbers 16:1-35._Korah, Dathan and Abiram_
God judged those who rose up against Moses and Aaron. “The earth opened its mouth and swallowed them.
Zechariah 2:8. “For whoever touches you touches the apple of His eye. God takes it personally when His people/servants are mistreated.
John 14:28 You have heard how I said to you, I go away, and come again to you. If you loved me, you would rejoice, because I said, I go to the Father: for my Father is greater than I.
1. John 4:34. Jesus said to them, ‘My food is to do the will of Him who sent Me and to accomplish His work.
2. John 5:30
I can do nothing on My own. As I hear, I judge, and My judgment is just, because I seek not My own will but the will of Him who sent Me.
3. John 6:38
For I have come down from heaven, not to do My own will, but the will of Him who sent Me.”
4. Luke 22:42* - In the Garden of Gethsemane
Father, if You are willing, remove this cup from Me. Nevertheless, not My will, but Yours, be done.
5. Matthew 26:39
My Father, if it is possible, let this cup pass from Me; yet not as I will, but as You will.”_
One of the fruits of the Holy Spirit is to respect and honor God Almighty and His servants on earth. If it is hard for you to honor God’s servant here on earth, then I wonder what kind of heaven you are preparing for.
One evidence of the Spirit of God Almighty and our Lord Jesus is a humble spirit. Jesus was humble. He absolutely respected and obeyed His Father’s voice and will, even to the point of His death on the cross. But today, many people who claim heaven and even "shut heaven" for others no longer respect genuine ministers of God. They speak to them anyhow and repay their hard labor with evil.
Many of them claim, "It was God who did it for me Not man," and therefore conclude, "So we don’t need to respect or honor human beings who are ministers of God." What a terrible generation we are in now!
Some of them receive prayer from a minister of God for blessing, breakthrougg, success, child bearing etc, and when God Almighty answers through His servant on their behalf, they turn around and use the same blessings to oppress and enslave that same genuine minister of God Almighty. I wonder what kind of heaven they think they are going to.
Others receive prayer, God answers through His servant, and then they use the same money they gave to oppress that minister of God while some are abusing the ministers of God Almighty because he/she did not have much at hand. Some foolish ones among then even believe that as a minister of God when you have abundant money you are genuine minister of God Almighty and God Almighty is with you. How many house did Jesus our Lord built on earth, Elijah, Paul, Peter etc., instead of them to stand and support genuine ministers of God with their substances they will look for money ritual and money londry ministers everywhere.
Beloved, repent before it is too late.
Beloved, if you are among those who act like this, you need to repent before it is too late.
Look, God Almighty did not spare the generation of Korah, Dathan, and Abiram. He will surely rise up and fight for His own people.
Be Thankful To Man & God Almighty
Luke 17:12 And as he entered into a certain village, there met him ten men that were lepers, which stood afar off:
Luke 17:13 And they lifted up their voices, and said, Jesus, Master, have mercy on us.
Luke 17:14 And when he saw them, he said to them, Go show yourselves to the priests. And it came to pass, that, as they went, they were cleansed.
Luke 17:15 And one of them, when he saw that he was healed, turned back, and with a loud voice glorified God,
Luke 17:16 And fell down on his face at his feet, giving him thanks: and he was a Samaritan.
Luke 17:17 And Jesus answering said, Were there not ten cleansed? but where are the nine?
Luke 17:18 There are not found that returned to give glory to God, save this stranger.
Luke 17:19 And he said to him, Arise, go your way: your faith has made you whole.
Greatfulness and appreciation are the keys to receiving more from God Almighty.
2 Timothy 3:1 This know also, that in the last days perilous times shall come.
2 Timothy 3:2 For men shall be lovers of their own selves, covetous, boasters, proud, blasphemers, disobedient to parents, unthankful, unholy,
2 Timothy 3:3 Without natural affection, truce breakers, false accusers, incontinent, fierce, despisers of those that are good,
2 Timothy 3:4 Traitors, heady, high minded, lovers of pleasures more than lovers of God;
2 Timothy 3:5 Having a form of godliness, but denying the power thereof: from such turn away.
God wants us to always be thankful to Him first, and to those He uses for us, because it makes us children of God. He was the first to do this with our Lord Jesus. Even though all power belongs to Him, He exalted our Lord Jesus above everything on earth and in heaven. He did not say Jesus is below Him, but He gave all power to Him because of the kind of sacrifice our Lord Jesus made.
The genuine ministers of God are passing through a lot for the kingdom of God to be populated. They suffer many things, and for many of them, the reason they are poor is because of the righteousness and the truth they stand for. They face the devil and fight against the works of the devil so that men's souls can be saved. And the devil is also fighting everything about their lives.
Philippians 2:7 But made himself of no reputation, and took on him the form of a servant, and was made in the likeness of men:
Philippians 2:8 And being found in fashion as a man, he humbled himself, and became obedient to death, even the death of the cross.
Philippians 2:9 Why God also has highly exalted him, and given him a name which is above every name:
Philippians 2:10 That at the name of Jesus every knee should bow, of things in heaven, and things in earth, and things under the earth;
Philippians 2:11 And that every tongue should confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.
God Almighty moves in an atmosphere of appreciation. He always appreciates and honors those who work with Him and obey His voice.
As believers, we must learn to honor God and respect those who carry the mantle of God, and those the Lord has chosen for His work. When we do this, we are indirectly honoring God, not man. But failing to give thanks and respect to them can lead to disaster for us.
God will not allow you to disrespect His servant that He has called and chosen, and then turn around to bless and congratulate you for what you have done. Check your Bible very well — from Genesis to Revelation and you will never see that in the Bible.
There are some things that hinder prayers from being answered. These are the things that throw many believers into affliction and trouble, and also give the devil access over many Christians.
God Almighty has standards and rules that govern His kingdom. Once you break the standard, then you have missed it.
If you are reading this message, check yourself and repent, so that the will of the devil will not prosper over your life.
To be continue later.
Apostle David Oluwapemi
